creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
After I updated the system to 
> FreeBSD xx.xx.xx 12.2-STABLE FreeBSD 12.2-STABLE #0 r365830M: Thu Sep 17 00:45:39 PDT 2020     unknown@xx.xx:/disk-huge/sys/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64
and packages 'kldload vboxdrv.ko' now causes kernel crash, making VirtualBox unusable.

The previous kernel was from 3-4 days ago and vboxdrv.ko didn't crash.

virtualbox-ose-5.2.44
